justification: The diff correctly updates Maven compiler settings to Java 21 and migrates all javax.servlet imports to jakarta.servlet, along with updating the web.xml namespace and version to Jakarta EE 10 (6.0). However, it does not leverage any Java 21-specific idioms (e.g., pattern matching, records, virtual threads), so idiomatic_java21 is moderate. The migration is clean with no spurious changes, and all deprecated javax patterns are cleared.
